steps.name: Add StoppedBy::Process variant to overdrive-core
steps.criteria: StoppedBy enum in crates/overdrive-core/src/transition_reason.rs has a Process variant appended after Reconciler (discriminants: Operator=0, Reconciler=1, Process=2); StoppedBy::Process is derived with the same traits as the existing variants (Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq, Hash, Serialize, Deserialize, ToSchema, rkyv::Archive, rkyv::Serialize, rkyv::Deserialize); human_readable() on TransitionReason::Stopped { by: StoppedBy::Process } returns "stopped (by process)"; the Reconciler variant docstring no longer mentions "e.g. clean exit"

steps.name: Fix classify() and update all StoppedBy generators
steps.criteria: classify(&ExitKind::CleanExit, false) in crates/overdrive-control-plane/src/worker/exit_observer.rs returns (AllocState::Terminated, TransitionReason::Stopped { by: StoppedBy::Process }); the unit test previously named clean_exit_intentional_false_terminates_with_reconciler_stop is renamed and asserts StoppedBy::Process instead of StoppedBy::Reconciler; arb_transition_reason() in crates/overdrive-control-plane/tests/acceptance/alloc_status_row_archive_roundtrip.rs includes Just(StoppedBy::Process) in the StoppedBy prop_oneof alongside Operator and Reconciler; arb_transition_reason() in crates/overdrive-control-plane/tests/acceptance/submit_event_serialization.rs includes Just(StoppedBy::Process) in the same way; arb_transition_reason() in crates/overdrive-control-plane/tests/acceptance/alloc_status_snapshot.rs includes Just(StoppedBy::Process) in the same way
